div.head: The Ambassador in China (Stuart) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 2016. When Embassy representatives October 2 informed Governor Central Bank substance your telegram 1101, September 3, 4 p.m., he replied that he and K. P. ChenPresident of the Universal Trading Corporation. had proposed that UTC activities should consist of following in future: (1) liquidation paper commitments; (2) purchases on Chinese Government account from private commercial channels in United States; (3) promotion of Chinese exports without, however, any participation in their commercial disposal.

In Embassy’s opinion this proposal constitutes basis for discussions here and in United States. For Department’s information, K. P. Chen stated to Embassy official in Shanghai last week-end that CSCChinese Supply Commission, official Chinese agency in Washington handling procurement of lend-lease shipments. It was dissolved on August 1, 1947, except for completion of “old business”, and its functions were transferred to the Universal Trading Corporation. staff being drastically curtailed.
